title: HG Stain Remover Extra Strong, Carpet & Upholstery Cleaner with Oxygen – 500ml
features: HG Stain Remover spray: A powerful multi-use stain cleaner, with active oxygen, which acts as a clothes stain remover, carpet cleaner, car upholstery cleaner, rug cleaner or spot cleaner for fabrics

For nearly all types of fabrics: Safe to use on cotton or most synthetic clothing fabrics, wool carpets, fabric car interiors, curtains, bedding and soft furnishings. Always perform a patch test first
Removes deeply ingrained marks: The fabric and pet stain remover rapidly gets to work as a mud, wine, coffee, make-up, chocolate, sauce, lipstick, shoe polish, fruit juice, pen or blood stain remover
Easy to use pre-wash fabric cleaner: Spray the stains, leave to work for a few minutes, then wipe off the released dirt with a clean, absorbent cloth. Do not use on delicate materials or metal
1 x HG Stain Remover Extra Strong, 500ml. Discover the full range of HG cleaning products, including wood stain remover, mould remover, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays
description: Product Description HG Stain Remover Spray Extra Strong - for carpets, clothing and upholstery - removes even the worst stains, such as wine, coffee, chocolate, sauce, pen, mud, lipstick, shoe polish, fruit juice, grease and more. With this powerful and effective stain spray even the most deeply ingrained stains can be removed. The ideal pet stain remover, carpet cleaner shampoo, fabric stain remover and car upholstery cleaner for your home or vehicle. The easy to use, ultra strong stain spray is strengthened with active oxygen and removes stains from nearly all types of textiles, such as tops, skirts, school uniforms, bedding, rugs, fabric upholstery, cushions and curtains. Always perform a patch test before use – not suitable for oriental rugs or delicate textiles. Includes: 1 x HG Stain Remover Extra Strong (500ml spray). How to use: 1. Spray the stains completely and leave to work for a few minutes. 2. Wipe off the released dirt with a clean and absorbent cloth. Keep this HG cleaner out of children's reach. Always read the label. Discover the HG professional range of specialist household cleaning products and cleaning sprays, including HG Mould Remover, HG Limescale Remover, multi-purpose cleaners and all surface cleaner sprays for your home, office or outside space. Ingredients Stain Spray Safety Warning Warning h319- causes serious eye irritation. P101- if medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. P102- keep out of reach of children. P264- wash hands thoroughly after handling. P305+p351+p338- if in eyes: rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do. Continue rinsing. Attention: you are advised in all cases to test the colour-fastness of the material beforehand by rubbing an inconspicuous area with a cloth moistened with HG 'stain spray extra strong'. Not suitable for oriental rugs and materials that are unsuitable for wet cleaning. Use HG 'spot & stain spray cleaner' (HG product 93) for delicate materials. Do not mix with chlorine/chlorine-bleach. Do not spray onto metal. Store upright in a cool and dry place. Medical personnel can request the data sheet via +31 (0)36 54 94 777. The consumer's information sheet can be obtained via www.HG.eu Box Contains 1 x 0.5L Extra Strong Stain Spray Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: HG International b.v., P.J. Oudweg 41, 1314 CJ Almere, The Netherlands. See more
